explanations.pt-br: Imports centrais: loader de diretório, VectorStoreIndex e LLM.
explanations.en-us: Core imports: directory loader, VectorStoreIndex, and LLM.

explanations.pt-br: SimpleDirectoryReader carrega arquivos e preserva metadata útil para fontes.
explanations.en-us: SimpleDirectoryReader loads files and preserves useful source metadata.

explanations.pt-br: VectorStoreIndex cria nodes, embeddings e índice vetorial a partir dos documentos.
explanations.en-us: VectorStoreIndex creates nodes, embeddings, and a vector index from the documents.

explanations.pt-br: Query engine combina retriever e LLM. O top-k controla quantos nodes entram no contexto.
explanations.en-us: The query engine combines retriever and LLM. Top-k controls how many nodes enter the context.

explanations.pt-br: A resposta vem com source_nodes, o que facilita auditoria e citação das fontes.
explanations.en-us: The response includes source_nodes, which makes source auditing and citation easier.
